ConstructorParams.summary: Initializes an object instance with the provided values.

Code.summary: Gets or sets the code value.

Groups.summary: Gets or sets the method group collection.

Methods.summary: Gets or sets the method collection.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the name value.

Properties.summary: Gets or sets the property collection.

Remarks.summary: Gets or sets the remarks value.

Summary.summary: Gets or sets the summary value.

Syntax.summary: Gets or sets the class syntax.
